statement: In every magma, Equation 1287 (`x = y * (((x * y) * x) * z)`) implies Equation 1445 (`x = (x * y) * (x * (y * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0836
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x y) x) z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x y) (op x (op y y)))
